top_signals.title: China Beef Curbs Start Rippling Across Brazil Meat Industry
top_signals.summary: Brazil is starting to feel the impact of China’s beef import quota, with lower shipments to the country’s largest overseas market reverberating across the entire supply chain.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Korea ETF’s (EWY) Record Inflow Fuels SK Hynix Proxy Play
top_signals.summary: A record inflow hit the largest US-listed South Korea exchange-traded fund, as investors seeking exposure to SK Hynix Inc. piled into the ETF as a proxy at a time when the chipmaker’s new American depositary receipts trade at a substantial premium to its local shares.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Toast the City Awards 2026 finalists announced – vote now!
top_signals.summary: It’s here: the Toast the City Finalists have been announced, with bars, restaurants, coffee shops, green spaces and more from across the City being celebrated in the Square Mile’s biggest and best awards.
